name: write_file
description: Writes text content to a file. Use append: true to safely add content to the end of an existing file without reading it first — ideal for updating index.md or log files. Without append, the full content replaces the file; if the file already exists you must also pass overwrite: true or the skill will refuse.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file to write.

content.description: The text content to write or append.

overwrite.description: Set to true to allow overwriting an existing file when not using append mode. Defaults to false.

append.description: Set to true to append content to the end of an existing file instead of replacing it. Creates the file if it does not exist. Overwrite is ignored when append is true.
